main_event: Family near Defuniak Springs saw round baseball-sized light travel NW to ENE for 3 or 4 seconds on 20 October 1969.
sighted_object: round, baseball-sized, traveled from NW to ENE, beneath clouds
witness_description: five civilians total, including television technician and family walking north on dirt road near city limits
interesting_points: Observer and family walking north on dirt road when wife called attention to UFO
Flight path: out of north-west in circular curve, to north-east; half-second turned to east
Three satellite decays occurred at approximate time of sighting
Hurricane Laurie centered approx 370 mi SSW at time of UFO sighting
Overcast conditions, lightly drizzling, UFO seen beneath overcast
Observer reported UVI helicopter and UVI jet-propelled acft over home six minutes after sighting
Preliminary analysis: space hardware junk decaying orbit destroyed by incandescence, or meteorite
